mapper.select: select ui.college , sr.user_info_user_info_id_1 , sr.building_name , ui.role_enum_role_enum_id_1 , sr.scan_id , sr.room_number , ui.phone_number , ui.registration_date , ui.user_status_enum_user_status_enum_id_1 , sr.scan_time , ui.student_id , ui.password , ui.major , ui.name FROM scan_record sr left join user_info ui on sr.user_info_user_info_id_1 = ui.user_info_id ${ew.customSqlSegment}

select ui.college , sr.user_info_user_info_id_1 , sr.building_name , ui.role_enum_role_enum_id_1 , sr.scan_id , sr.room_number , ui.phone_number , ui.registration_date , ui.user_status_enum_user_status_enum_id_1 , sr.scan_time , ui.student_id , ui.password , ui.major , ui.name FROM scan_record sr left join user_info ui on sr.user_info_user_info_id_1 = ui.user_info_id ${ew.customSqlSegment}

select ui.college , sr.user_info_user_info_id_1 , sr.building_name , ui.role_enum_role_enum_id_1 , sr.scan_id , sr.room_number , ui.phone_number , ui.registration_date , ui.user_status_enum_user_status_enum_id_1 , sr.scan_time , ui.student_id , ui.password , ui.major , ui.name FROM scan_record sr left join user_info ui on sr.user_info_user_info_id_1 = ui.user_info_id where sr.scan_id = #{id}
